name: Matomo (Piwik)
description: Self-hosted or cloud web analytics: tracking pixel, JS tracker, and HTTP tracking API.
methodology: Trackers hit matomo.php or piwik.php with idsite. Org-specific: host is often analytics.* or matomo.* on your domain—add every hostname you use. Review GDPR tools (anonymize IP, consent), goals, and ecommerce parameters.
